arts.sum: Paul Smyth has been recalled to the QPR starting line-up for this afternoon’s game at Fratton Park. Smyth is in for Yang Min-Hyeok, who started in his place against Derby but today is on the bench – as his Karamoko Dembele, who is back in the squad after a knee injury.
